Meaning.En: A motor vehicle with four wheels, typically powered by an internal combustion engine and used for transporting passengers.
Meaning.Example: She parked her automobile in the garage after work.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc mua, lái, hoặc bảo trì xe hơi cá nhân.
Situation.En: Contexts involving purchasing, driving, or maintaining a personal car.

Situation.Vi: Trong ngành công nghiệp ô tô, thuật ngữ "automobile" thường được dùng trong văn phong trang trọng hoặc kỹ thuật.
Situation.En: In the automotive industry, "automobile" is often used in formal or technical writing.
